title: helianthus niveus subsp. tephrodes
intro: Helianthus niveus subsp. tephrodes, also known as the silver daisy or pale daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its rich content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Helianthus niveus subsp. tephrodes have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
